title: Implement OAuth2 login flow
description: Add OAuth2 authentication support for GitHub and Google providers. Must handle token refresh and revocation.

title: Fix pagination bug on Issues list page
description: When navigating to page 3+, the offset calculation is off by one. Root cause: zero-indexed offset not aligned with UI page numbers.

title: Add bulk status update endpoint
description: REST endpoint to update status on multiple issues in one request. Accepts array of issue IDs and target status.

title: Integrate Slack notifications for critical issues
description: When an issue with priority 'Critical' is created or its status changes, send a Slack notification to the #alerts channel.

title: Database migration: add storyPoints column
description: Migrate existing issues table to include nullable storyPoints integer column. Provide rollback script.

title: Write integration tests for IssueService
description: Cover create, update, delete, and filter scenarios. Use real SQLite in-memory database for integration tests.

title: Performance: add index on status column
description: Issue list queries are slow under load. Adding a B-tree index on the status column should reduce query time from ~200ms to ~10ms.

title: UI: dark mode support
description: Add CSS variable-based theming with a toggle switch in the header. Persist user preference in localStorage.
